original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') or (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_nations1 AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
    FROM nation
    WHERE n_name IN ('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE')
)
SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT n1.n_name AS supp_nation, n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
           EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
           l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM filtered_nations1 n1
    JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey AND l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN filtered_nations1 n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
    WHERE (n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' AND n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') OR
          (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' AND n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA')
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Split the OR condition into two separate queries with UNION ALL to allow better optimization of each part
Replace implicit joins (comma-separated tables) with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization hints
Separate the complex OR condition into two distinct query paths to allow early filtering
